text.title: django-constants Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for django-constants as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using .label lookup via dict(STATUS_CHOICES).get(status) instead of the .label attribute on TextChoices members.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: dict lookup requires constructing a dict from tuples on every call. TextChoices members have .label directly: OrderStatus.PENDING.label returns "Pending Payment" without any dict construction.

failure-mode.description: Switching from string TextChoices to integer IntegerChoices after data is in production.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The stored values change type, requiring a data migration for all existing rows. Choose the type at design time. Use TextChoices for readability in Django admin and migrations; use IntegerChoices only when storage size matters at very large scale.
